assessor_results.critic_raw: The task prompt is truncated. It ends with '[rest of design_narrative]' after establishing only that the study uses four years of ED encounters linked to ADT and bed-management outcomes, with prediction time defined at triage completion. Without the full methodology — feature construction, model architecture, train/test split strategy, evaluation metrics, outcome definition, and handling of censoring or operational confounders — there is nothing substantive to critique. Any issues I raised would be fabricated from thin air, which would be worse than no critique at all. Please provide the complete design narrative.

It ends with '[rest of design_narrative]', meaning the actual methodological content — feature engineering, label definition, model architecture, evaluation protocol, train/test split strategy, and outcome definitions — was never provided. A genuine critique requires the complete design narrative.
